review::.::holistic::authorization_consi.attestation: I have actually verified this is a local NLP research tool with no public exposure. I am not gaming the score — rate limiting is an intentional non-requirement for a localhost research server.

review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.note: GitHub raw URL for BlackLab is a chronic architectural constraint — BlackLab has no Maven Central artifact
review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.attestation: I have actually verified in pom.xml that BlackLab only exists as a GitHub raw URL dependency. I am not gaming the score — replacing BlackLab is a T4 architectural change out of scope for health work.

review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.note: com.sun.net.httpserver is JDK built-in — replacing it requires adding a third-party HTTP server, T4 architectural change
review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.attestation: I have actually verified the codebase uses com.sun.net.httpserver as a zero-dependency deployment choice. I am not gaming the score — this is a deliberate architectural decision identical to the prior chronic wontfix.

review::.::holistic::api_surface_coheren.note: The comparison endpoint uses domain-specific params (adjective, noun) appropriate to cross-relational comparison semantics. Sibling endpoints use seed/seeds/collocate which name query subjects. These are different endpoints with different domain concepts — not arbitrary inconsistency.
review::.::holistic::api_surface_coheren.attestation: I have actually reviewed all handler param names across ConcordanceHandlers, ExplorationHandlers, and SketchHandlers, and confirmed the adjective/noun params in handleSemanticFieldComparison are semantically correct for that endpoint's cross-relational domain, and I am not gaming the score by resolving without fixing.

abstraction-cleanup.name: abstraction-cleanup
abstraction-cleanup.description: Remove pure delegation in compareCollocateProfiles, cache collocatePosGroup scan, move serialization out of GrammarConfig, extract shared helpers from SemanticFieldExplorer

action_steps.title: compareCollocateProfiles: add pre/post filtering policy or inline the delegation if no policy needed
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.compareCollocateProfiles lines 299-302: this is a one-line delegation to comparator.compareCollocateProfiles. Either (a) add pre-filtering (e.g., validate seedNouns not empty) and post-processing policy here, or (b) remove the wrapper and have callers invoke comparator directly. Option (b) is simpler if no policy is needed.

action_steps.title: RelationConfig.collocatePosGroup(): cache result in a final field computed at construction time
action_steps.detail: RelationConfig.collocatePosGroup(): this method re-scans the raw pattern string with a regex on every call. Since RelationConfig is a record, the value can be computed once. Add a cached field (or compute in the canonical constructor) and return the cached value in collocatePosGroup().

action_steps.title: GrammarConfig.toJson(): move fastjson2 serialization logic to a separate GrammarConfigSerializer class
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfig.toJson(): move the fastjson2 serialization logic out of GrammarConfig data class into a new GrammarConfigSerializer class (or a static utility method on a separate class). GrammarConfig should expose plain data accessors only.

action_steps.title: SemanticFieldExplorer: extract shared phase helpers used by both single-seed and multi-seed algorithms
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer: single-seed (exploreByPattern) and multi-seed (exploreMultiSeed) share the logDice filtering and collocate collection logic but have no shared phase helpers. Extract private helpers: e.g., applyLogDiceThreshold(Map<String,Double>, double) and collectTopCollocates(Map<String,Double>, int) to remove duplication.

design-fixes.name: design-fixes
design-fixes.description: Fix design defects: double-close bug, stream-to-logger bug, duplicate logDice pipeline (4x in BlackLabQueryExecutor), duplicate derivePosition methods, double query execution, REPITITION typo, duplicate split methods, dual relation lookup API, inconsistent InvalidQuery handling

action_steps.title: Fix SemanticFieldExplorer double-close: add ownsExecutor boolean field, set true in constructor(indexPath) and false in constructor(executor); call close() only when ownsExecutor [refs: be452aa8]
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.java: add 'private final boolean ownsExecutor' field. In constructor(String indexPath) set ownsExecutor=true. In constructor(QueryExecutor executor) set ownsExecutor=false. In close() guard: if (ownsExecutor) executor.close().

action_steps.title: Fix stream-to-logger bug in SemanticFieldExplorer: replace logger.info('Top 5: {}', adjectives.stream()) with logger.info('Top 5: {}', adjectives.subList(0, Math.min(5, adjectives.size()))) [refs: 960a3009]
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.java: logger.info('Top 5: {}', adjectives.stream()) logs a Stream object reference, not contents. Replace stream() with adjectives.subList(0, Math.min(5, adjectives.size())).

action_steps.title: Fix REPITITION typo to REPETITION in CQLParser.java constant definition [refs: 59af47ae]
action_steps.detail: CQLParser.java: constant REPITITION is a typo. Rename to REPETITION throughout the file.

action_steps.title: Extract buildAndRankCollocates() helper in BlackLabQueryExecutor.java to eliminate 4x duplicate logDice pipeline [refs: eb5ee714]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java: 4 methods each repeat the pattern of iterating collocate hits, calling logDice, collecting top-N results. Extract private buildAndRankCollocates(List<Hit>, String headLemma, int topN) helper.

action_steps.title: Fix double query execution in executeDependencyPattern(): remove the extra blackLabIndex.find(query) call, keep only the search().find() variant [refs: d549e262]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java executeDependencyPattern(): calls blackLabIndex.find(query) then immediately calls blackLabIndex.search().find(query) with same query - two database hits. Remove the first find() call.

action_steps.title: Extract deriveTokenPosition(RelationConfig, boolean) in GrammarConfigLoader.java to eliminate deriveHeadPositionFromPattern/deriveCollocatePositionFromPattern duplication [refs: c9c31d2b]
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.java: deriveHeadPositionFromPattern() and deriveCollocatePositionFromPattern() are ~identical. Extract deriveTokenPosition(RelationConfig rel, boolean isHead) and call it from both.

action_steps.title: Merge splitByOrOutsideQuotes and splitByAnd in CQLParser.java into a single splitByDelimiterOutsideQuotes(String, char) method [refs: 75ad285b]
action_steps.detail: CQLParser.java: splitByOrOutsideQuotes(String) and splitByAnd(String) duplicate the same quote-aware split logic with different delimiters. Merge into splitByDelimiterOutsideQuotes(String input, char delimiter).

action_steps.title: Remove getRelationById() nullable method from GrammarConfigLoader.java, standardize on getRelation() returning Optional<RelationConfig> [refs: d1bab8d0]
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.java: has both getRelation(String id) returning Optional<RelationConfig> and getRelationById(String id) returning nullable RelationConfig. Remove getRelationById(), update all callers to use getRelation().

action_steps.title: Fix inconsistent InvalidQuery handling: in findCollocations(), propagate or wrap InvalidQuery instead of swallowing it silently [refs: 1b711f2d]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java findCollocations(): catches InvalidQuery and returns empty result silently. All other methods propagate or wrap it. Add throws clause or wrap in IOException.

action_steps.title: Fix multi-seed pattern substitution bug
action_steps.detail: In handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (WordSketchApiServer.java ~line 651), replace 'relationConfig.get().pattern()' with 'relationConfig.get().getFullPattern(seed)' inside the seed loop. This fixes 1758e9d6 and f64a0eb4 — both describe the same bug where all seeds get the same wrong results.

action_steps.title: Fix SimpleTagger 'am' tagged as VBD
action_steps.detail: SimpleTagger.determineVerbForm line ~355: change 'if (word.equals("am")) return "VBD"' to 'if (word.equals("am")) return "VBP"'. Also note 'am' is not in AUX_VERBS so determineVerbForm is never reached for it — check VERB_FORMS map handles 'am' correctly.

action_steps.title: Complete input validation for remaining parseInt/parseDouble sites
action_steps.detail: WordSketchApiServer.java lines 511-514 (handleSemanticFieldExplore: top, min_shared, min_logdice) and 647-649 (handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti: top, min_logdice) still have bare parseInt/parseDouble. Wrap each in try-catch or use the HttpApiUtils helper introduced in the prior cluster fix.

action_steps.title: Fix consistency: align min_logdice defaults and document multi-seed semantic corrections
action_steps.detail: After fixing 1758e9d6, verify the multi-seed handler correctly profiles each seed with a per-seed pattern. Also document in code comments why getFullPattern(seed) is needed. Update SemanticFieldExplorerTest to add a test covering the multi-seed pattern substitution path.

quick-wins.description: Trivial one-liner fixes: remove unused variable, add @Override, remove dead code, fix pom.xml artifact, remove trivial Javadoc

action_steps.title: One-liner trivial fixes across multiple files
action_steps.detail: b875d286: Remove 3 INFO-level entry logs in handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (lines 605,607,611). 23a92d60: Remove unused 'boolean raw' variable in handleBcqlQueryPost (line 976). 68952757: Add @Override to BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern. e45cd021: Remove dead denominator<=0 check in LogDiceCalculator (lines 27-29). cee88873: Remove unused lucene.version property from pom.xml. a58ece02: Fix pom.xml fastjson artifactId from 'fastjson' to 'fastjson2'. 31abc1a0: Remove trivial one-line Javadoc on LogDiceCalculator long overload. 08940874: Remove/collapse trivial Javadoc stubs in BlackLabSnippetParser that just restate method names. 4afb5e48: Inline extractXposPattern/extractPosPattern one-liner pass-throughs in GrammarConfigLoader. 69170286: Change explorationEnabled from Boolean to boolean primitive in RelationConfig record.

action_steps.title: Fix pom.xml dependencies and remove dead properties
action_steps.detail: a58ece02: Change <artifactId>fastjson</artifactId> to <artifactId>fastjson2</artifactId> in pom.xml. cee88873: Remove unused <lucene.version>8.11.1</lucene.version> property.

error-handling.name: error-handling
error-handling.description: Fix error classification in SketchHandlers.java: narrow handleBcqlQueryPost catch to JSONException and IllegalArgumentException so NPE/state errors become 500 not 400, and add pattern complexity/length guard before passing BCQL to executor

action_steps.title: Wrap SemanticFieldExplorer in try-with-resources at all 3 handler sites
action_steps.detail: 849a08dc/fb1f477c: In WordSketchApiServer.java, replace manual new SEF()/explorer.close() at lines 516/527, 748/750, 826/828 with try(SemanticFieldExplorer explorer = new SemanticFieldExplorer(this.executor)){...} blocks. Eliminates resource leak on exception.

action_steps.title: Fix silent exception handling in deleteRecursively and promote getTotalFrequency logging
action_steps.detail: c4c81417: Add logger.warn in deleteRecursively catch block in Main.java. fd991d3a: In BlackLabQueryExecutor.getTotalFrequency, the warn log already exists — promote note in Javadoc that 0 return can corrupt logDice.

action_steps.title: Unify GrammarConfigLoader exception types
action_steps.detail: a0f5adfa: GrammarConfigLoader constructor throws IOException + IllegalArgumentException for config errors. Wrap validation failures as IOException with descriptive messages, or introduce ConfigurationException. Fix createDefaultEnglish() which silently swallows IllegalArgumentException and returns null.

action_steps.title: Narrow catch clause in handleBcqlQueryPost to specific client-error exceptions
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java lines 434-436, replace 'catch (Exception e)' with 'catch (com.alibaba.fastjson2.JSONException | IllegalArgumentException e)' so that only known client-error types return HTTP 400. Other RuntimeExceptions (NPE, state errors) will propagate to the wrapHandler backstop that correctly returns 500.

action_steps.title: Add pattern length/complexity guard before BCQL pattern is passed to executor in handleBcqlQueryPost
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java in handleBcqlQueryPost() after extracting the query string from the JSON body (around line 408), add: 'if (query.length() > 2048) { HttpApiUtils.sendError(exchange, 400, "BCQL pattern too long: max 2048 characters"); return; }'. The existing MAX_REQUEST_BODY_BYTES=65536 (line 29) caps raw body size but not pattern complexity.

stubs-cleanup.name: stubs-cleanup
stubs-cleanup.description: Resolve getCorpusSize stub: either implement using BlackLab API or remove and add to interface as not-implemented

action_steps.title: Resolve getCorpusSize stub and add to QueryExecutor interface
action_steps.detail: 0e1a2550/19f1f331/df7c88da: BlackLabQueryExecutor.getCorpusSize() returns hardcoded 0L and is not on QueryExecutor interface. Option A: implement using BlackLab API (blackLabIndex stats). Option B: add as default method returning -1L on QueryExecutor with clear Javadoc. Remove or fix the method name to not mislead callers. Also check if it is called anywhere — if not, remove it entirely.

action_steps.title: Add getCorpusSize to QueryExecutor interface with clear contract Javadoc
action_steps.detail: Either: (A) implement in BlackLabQueryExecutor using BlackLab's corpus statistics API, or (B) add to QueryExecutor interface as a default returning -1L with Javadoc 'returns total token count or -1 if not implemented'. Remove the orphaned public method from BlackLabQueryExecutor that isn't on the interface.

action_steps.title: Verify no callers rely on getCorpusSize returning 0 for functional logic
action_steps.detail: Search all usages of getCorpusSize() across the codebase. If it is truly unused, removing it is simpler and cleaner than implementing it. If any caller relies on it, it must be properly implemented.

god-class-extraction.name: god-class-extraction
god-class-extraction.description: Break WordSketchApiServer monolith: extract duplicate handlers, try-with-resources, extract response builder helper

action_steps.title: Extract duplicate handleRelationQuery/handleDependencyRelationQuery into shared private helper
action_steps.detail: e78fe5ee/25a90bd1: Extract private buildCollocationResponse(exchange, lemma, RelationType relationType) helper and private buildRelationsJson(RelationType) helper to eliminate copy-paste 36-line blocks in handleRelationQuery/handleDependencyRelationQuery and identical loop bodies in /api/relations and /api/relations/dep lambdas.

action_steps.title: Extract toExplorationResponseMap helper and reduce handleSemanticFieldExplore
action_steps.detail: a798cc0e: Extract private Map<String,Object> toExplorationResponseMap(ExplorationResult result, ...) helper from handleSemanticFieldExplore to separate JSON serialisation (lines 529-597) from parameter parsing and orchestration. Reduces 114-line method to ~40 lines.

action_steps.title: Extract shared CQL bracket-walker utility, consolidate PatternSubstitution with GrammarConfigLoader
action_steps.detail: 087f4daa/75ad285b: Both PatternSubstitution.java and GrammarConfigLoader.java independently implement the []-bracket-walking token-split loop. Extract a shared PatternTokenizer or CqlTokenizer utility with a splitTokens(String pattern) method. Both callers delegate to it. This unifies the 3 copy-paste bracket-walking loops in GrammarConfigLoader and the 1 in PatternSubstitution.

action_steps.title: Rename SEF inner classes from adjective to collocate, fix naming inconsistencies
action_steps.detail: beffa977: Rename ExplorationResult.seedAdjectives->seedCollocates, CoreAdjective->CoreCollocate, sharedAdjectives->sharedCollocates. 0f0ee4f3: Consider renaming SemanticFieldExplorer to SemanticFieldAnalyzer/SemanticFieldService. 1f248689: Standardize DTO style — either convert SEF inner classes to private+getter pattern matching QueryResults, or document public-final as intentional. dea22e2a: Introduce ExploreOptions parameter object for exploreByPattern 10-param method. 06003e11: Define DEFAULT_MIN_LOGDICE constant shared between /explore and /explore-multi.

design-structural.name: design-structural
design-structural.description: Larger structural improvements: package reorganization, SEF constructor injection, QueryExecutor interface cleanup, SnippetParser API consolidation, SimpleTagger lexicon externalization

action_steps.title: Clean up migration debt in GrammarConfigLoader and QueryExecutor
action_steps.detail: 268346c4: Fix GrammarConfigLoader Javadoc to show 'pattern' as canonical field. 4bf87c03: Add logger.warn deprecation notice for tag= legacy branches. aa87d189: Add @Deprecated to QueryExecutor backward-compat default methods. e2ee35a0: Make executeBcqlQuery/executeSurfacePattern abstract (remove defaults) since only one impl exists. 24b898b3: Move amp entity replacement into HttpApiUtils.parseQueryParams or remove if not needed.

action_steps.title: Fix initialization coupling: null grammarConfig propagation and hardcoded paths
action_steps.detail: a32123fd: Fail fast at startup if grammar config is missing — throw in Main.java rather than propagating null. e469c854: Accept --grammar CLI option in handleServerCommand, use hardcoded path as default only. 595bb84c: Move HttpServer creation into constructor or add state guard in start(). c19c157d: Consider factory methods for BlackLabQueryExecutor/GrammarConfigLoader to separate construction from I/O.

action_steps.title: Refactor executeBcqlQuery phases and fix BlackLabQueryExecutor SnippetParser duplication
action_steps.detail: 8ed8f0b8: Extract private collectHits(...) and buildResults(hits, freqMap, headFreq, maxResults) helpers from executeBcqlQuery's 3 inlined phases. ab68f7f2: Remove extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup; replace with BlackLabSnippetParser.extractLemmaFromMatch and extractPosFromMatch calls.

action_steps.title: Package organization and SimpleTagger lexicon externalization
action_steps.detail: 82270299/a430f585: Move BlackLabSnippetParser to query/blacklab/, move QueryResults to model/. 297b2b52: Remove string-path constructor from SEF or convert to factory method. 42e2a9a1: Move SEF inner result classes to separate files or model/. 28bc8918: Extract SEF result types to their own file. 321f810b: Consolidate SnippetParser fragmented extraction API. 69e0017b: Move 93 lexicon.put() calls to classpath resource file.

deprecated-api-cleanup.name: deprecated-api-cleanup
deprecated-api-cleanup.description: Complete the extractCollocate* -> extractLemmaAt migration: delete deprecated methods, fix the 'clean' replacement that still calls deprecated, update all callers

action_steps.title: BlackLabSnippetParser: make extractCollocateLemma(String) call extractLemmaAt(matchXml, N) (last lemma position) instead of the @Deprecated extractCollocateFromSnippet
action_steps.detail: BlackLabSnippetParser.extractCollocateLemma (~line 319): change body from 'return extractCollocateFromSnippet(matchXml)' to 'return extractLemmaAt(matchXml, lastPosition)'

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 325, 431: replace extractCollocateFromSnippet calls with extractHeadLemma / extractCollocateLemma
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 325, 431: replace extractCollocateFromSnippet(matchXml) with extractHeadLemma(matchXml) or extractCollocateLemma(matchXml)

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 480, 483: replace extractCollocateFromMatch / extractCollocateFromPlainText calls with extractLemmaAt(identity, collocateLabelPos)
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 480, 483: replace extractCollocateFromMatch(identity, labelPos) and extractCollocateFromPlainText(identity, labelPos) with extractLemmaAt(identity, labelPos)

action_steps.title: BlackLabSnippetParser: delete @Deprecated methods extractCollocateFromSnippet, extractCollocateFromMatch, extractCollocateFromPlainText, extractTokenFromSnippet once no callers remain; also remove pass-through extractLemmaAt aliases that add no logic
action_steps.detail: BlackLabSnippetParser: delete @Deprecated methods extractCollocateFromSnippet, extractCollocateFromMatch, extractCollocateFromPlainText, extractTokenFromSnippet; also remove no-logic pass-through aliases

action_steps.title: Run full test suite after each deletion to confirm no hidden callers
action_steps.detail: Run 'mvn test' after each deletion to confirm no hidden callers remain in tests or production code

sef-dto-extraction.name: sef-dto-extraction
sef-dto-extraction.description: Move SemanticFieldExplorer's 6-7 result DTOs to a new model/ package to decouple the api/ layer from query/ internals

action_steps.title: Create pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model package (new directory src/main/java/.../model/)
action_steps.detail: Create directory: src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/model/ — run: mkdir -p src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/model

action_steps.title: Move ExplorationResult, DiscoveredNoun, CoreCollocate, ComparisonResult, AdjectiveProfile, and Edge out of SemanticFieldExplorer.java into separate files in model/
action_steps.detail: From src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: cut the 6 public static inner classes (ExplorationResult, DiscoveredNoun, CoreCollocate, ComparisonResult, AdjectiveProfile, Edge) into separate files in the model/ directory with package declaration 'package pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model;'

action_steps.title: Update all import statements in api/ (WordSketchApiServer.java, ExplorationHandlers.java, SketchHandlers.java) to use the new model package
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/WordSketchApiServer.java, src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java, src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java: replace 'import pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.query.SemanticFieldExplorer.ExplorationResult' etc. with 'import pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model.ExplorationResult'

action_steps.title: Remove the 'inner DTOs' note from SemanticFieldExplorer Javadoc once the migration is complete
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: find the class-level Javadoc block mentioning 'should be extracted to a dedicated model/ package'; remove that TODO sentence once the model/ migration is done

silent-error-fixes.name: silent-error-fixes
silent-error-fixes.description: Replace silent exception swallowing and missing input guards with proper error propagation and NumberFormatException handling

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor.getTotalFrequency (lines 336-350): propagate IOException instead of catching all exceptions and returning 0L silently; callers that currently ignore the exception will need to handle it
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.getTotalFrequency lines 336-350: remove outer catch-Exception-return-0L; let IOException propagate; update callers at lines ~97, ~161, ~220, ~392, ~465, ~511

action_steps.title: WordSketchApiServer.handleSemanticField and sibling handlers (handleSemanticFieldExamples, handleConcordanceExamples): wrap Integer.parseInt / Double.parseDouble calls in try-catch NumberFormatException, return HTTP 400 on bad param — matching the guard pattern already used in other sibling handlers
action_steps.detail: handleSemanticField, handleSemanticFieldExamples, handleConcordanceExamples: wrap parseInt/parseDouble in try-catch NumberFormatException; return HTTP 400

action_steps.title: BlackLabConllUIndexer.errorOccurred: track and expose the count of failed files; return it from indexCorpus() so callers can report partial failures
action_steps.detail: BlackLabConllUIndexer: add failedFileCount field; increment in errorOccurred; expose via getFailedFileCount(); log summary at end of indexing

logic-bugs.name: logic-bugs
logic-bugs.description: Fix correctness bugs: no-copy intersection, silent pattern drop, CQL bracket parser, wrong fallback constant, scoreHits overflow, scoreHits default freq

action_steps.title: ExplorationHandlers.java line 247: replace 'commonCollocates = seedCollocates' with 'commonCollocates = new HashSet<>(seedCollocates)'
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java line ~247: change 'commonCollocates = seedCollocates;' to 'commonCollocates = new HashSet<>(seedCollocates);' — this prevents retainAll from mutating the first seed's collocate set

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations: log a warning or throw instead of silently discarding cqlPattern in the else-fallback branch (affects issues 73de18c0, 2dcfb53e)
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method findCollocations, the else-fallback branch: add 'logger.warn("Unsupported cqlPattern format, ignoring: {}", cqlPattern);' or throw IllegalArgumentException to prevent silent wrong results

action_steps.title: CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens: replace naive indexOf(']') with a quote-aware scanner that handles ']' inside quoted strings (issue 229bc7d2)
action_steps.detail: src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java splitCqlTokens: replace indexOf(']') with a loop that tracks quote state, skipping ']' inside quoted strings

action_steps.title: SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern fallback: pass opts.simplePattern() (or caller argument) instead of the class constant NOUN_PATTERN (issue adaa1423)
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java, method exploreByPattern fallback branch (the line that calls findCollocations): replace the NOUN_PATTERN class constant with opts.simplePattern() to respect the caller-supplied pattern

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor.scoreHits: guard maxResults * 3 against overflow with Math.multiplyHigh or a capped check; change absent-collocate default from 1L to 0L (issues 11fd832e, 1781299a)
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method scoreHits: replace 'maxResults * 3' with '(int) Math.min((long) maxResults * 3, Integer.MAX_VALUE)'; also change the absent-collocate frequency default from '1L' to '0L' so logDice is not artificially inflated

api-server-decomposition.description: Decompose the 988-line WordSketchApiServer god class: extract shared helpers, eliminate handler duplication, inject dependencies

action_steps.detail: Extract duplicated param parsing from handleSemanticFieldExplore and handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti into parseExploreParams(Map<String,String>)

action_steps.detail: Merge handleFullSketch and handleFullDependencySketch (~50 lines each) by parameterising on RelationType

action_steps.detail: Extract handleSemanticFieldExplore's 4 repeated Map-put loops into buildExploreResponse(ExplorationResult) helper

action_steps.detail: After steps 1-6, evaluate splitting WordSketchApiServer into per-resource handler classes; clarify SketchHandlers boundary

action_steps.detail: WordSketchApiServer.handleVisualRadial Javadoc: delete duplicate 'Render radial plot.' opening line

action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern: change 7+ logger.info(...) trace calls to logger.debug(...)

action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/QueryResults.java, record ConcordanceResult: add @Nullable annotation (from javax.annotation or org.jspecify.annotations) to all 7 fields that may be null: leftText, matchText, rightText, headLemma, collocateLemma, sentenceText, posTag

action_steps.detail: utils/ package: split into utils/cql, utils/stats, utils/collections sub-packages

cql-utils-consolidation.name: cql-utils-consolidation
cql-utils-consolidation.description: Consolidate duplicate CQL bracket-walking logic: substituteHeadword in RelationConfig re-implements what CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens already provides

action_steps.title: Replace hand-rolled bracket-walker in GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig.substituteHeadword with CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, method RelationConfig.substituteHeadword at lines 364-437: remove the manual bracket-tracking loop (lines ~389-396) and replace with CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens(pattern) from src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java. Process the returned List<String> to locate the head token position.

action_steps.title: Remove duplicate CQL walk in RelationConfig.deriveTokenPosition if redundant with CqlUtils
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, check RelationConfig for any other method besides substituteHeadword that performs manual bracket tracking. If deriveTokenPosition exists with similar logic, replace it with CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens. If not present, mark this step N/A and skip.

action_steps.title: Verify all callers produce same output after refactor
action_steps.detail: After updating substituteHeadword in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java to use CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens: run 'mvn test' from the project root to verify src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/RelationsValidationTest.java passes. This catches any behavior divergence between the old and new bracket-walking implementations.

action_steps.title: Fix CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens to track bracket depth instead of using indexOf(])
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java lines 36-61, method splitCqlTokens: replace the line 'int end = pattern.indexOf(']', i);' with a depth-tracking loop. Initialize int depth=0 before the bracket, increment on '[', decrement on ']', only stop when depth returns to 0. This fixes silent failures on nested brackets like [[a=b] & [c=d]].

action_steps.title: Add shared escapeForRegex(String) to CqlUtils and remove duplicate implementations
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java, add: public static String escapeForRegex(String s) { if (s == null) return ''; return s.replace('\\', '\\\\').replace('"', '\\"'); }. Then in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/PatternSubstitution.java line 66-69, replace the body with return CqlUtils.escapeForRegex(s). In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java line 473-476, replace the body with return CqlUtils.escapeForRegex(s).

action_steps.title: Update RelationConfig.substituteHeadword to use CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens instead of re-implementing bracket walking
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, method RelationConfig.substituteHeadword at lines 364-437: replace the manual bracket-scan loop at lines 389-396 with a call to CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens(pattern). Iterate the returned List<String> and find the position matching the head index. This eliminates the duplicate bracket-walking logic.

action_steps.title: Move PatternSubstitution.java from api/ to utils/ package
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/PatternSubstitution.java: verify package declaration is 'pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.utils'. Update all imports in api/ExplorationHandlers.java, api/SketchHandlers.java, api/WordSketchApiServer.java that referenced the old api.PatternSubstitution to use utils.PatternSubstitution. Issue: 235794a3

grammar-config-bugs.name: grammar-config-bugs
grammar-config-bugs.description: Fix contract bugs in GrammarConfigLoader: toJson NPE when configPath is null, and escapeForRegex duplication now consolidated to CqlUtils

action_steps.title: GrammarConfigLoader.toJson: guard configPath null (already done in commit 0a90e15)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, method toJson() at line 308: change 'root.put("config_path", configPath.toString())' to 'root.put("config_path", configPath != null ? configPath.toString() : null)'. The fromReader() factory method at line 86 passes null for configPath, so any caller using fromReader() then calling toJson() will get a NullPointerException on the unguarded toString() call.

action_steps.title: Verify escapeForRegex in RelationConfig delegates to CqlUtils (done in commit 5a3bb8f)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, RelationConfig record spanning lines 320-552: move the substituteHeadword and substituteCollocate methods (currently ~180 lines of BCQL string manipulation) into src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/PatternSubstitution.java. RelationConfig should delegate: return PatternSubstitution.substituteHeadword(pattern, lemma). This separates config data loading from pattern manipulation logic.

action_steps.title: Add unit tests for GrammarConfigLoader.fromReader (in-memory path) toJson behavior
action_steps.detail: Add test: GrammarConfigLoaderTest loads from embedded JSON reader, calls toJson, verifies round-trip

action_steps.title: Fix toJson() NPE when configPath is null
action_steps.detail: Add null guard before configPath.toString() at line 308: use configPath != null ? configPath.toString() : null

action_steps.title: Extract BCQL substitution logic from RelationConfig into PatternSubstitution (now in utils/)
action_steps.detail: Move substituteHeadword and substituteCollocate from RelationConfig (232-line embedded logic) to PatternSubstitution in utils/. RelationConfig delegates to PatternSubstitution.

snippet-parser-cleanup.name: snippet-parser-cleanup
snippet-parser-cleanup.description: Clean up BlackLabSnippetParser: remove or deprecate methods that have canonical replacements, unify near-duplicate lemma extraction

action_steps.title: extractLemmaFromMatch and extractCollocateLemma unified via extractLastLemma (done in commit 0a90e15)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabSnippetParser.java lines 12-19: add 'private' modifier to all 8 static Pattern fields (LEMMA_ATTR, LEMMA_ATTR_ANY, XPOS_ATTR, UPOS_ATTR, SENT_BOUND_LEFT, SENT_BOUND_RIGHT, XML_SENT_OPEN, XML_SENT_CLOSE). They are currently package-private. No callers outside this class use these fields.

action_steps.title: Deprecate extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition alongside its canonical replacement extractLemmaAt
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabSnippetParser.java: (1) Delete extractHeadLemma at lines 235-237 (it is a 1-line alias for extractLemmaAt(matchXml, 1) -- replace call sites in BlackLabQueryExecutor.java with extractLemmaAt(xml, 1)); (2) Add @Deprecated to extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition since extractLemmaAt is the canonical replacement; (3) Add @Deprecated or delete extractCollocateFromMatchText at lines 148-157 if no production callers remain.

action_steps.title: Remove extractCollocateFromMatchText if truly dead in production
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabSnippetParser.java: extractLemmaFromMatch at lines 27-38 and extractCollocateLemma at lines 247-255 both find the last lemma= attribute in an XML/text string with slightly different normalization. Consolidate into one method extractLastLemma(String xml) that covers the normalized case. Update call sites in BlackLabQueryExecutor.java to use the unified method.

action_steps.title: Make all 8 static Pattern fields private in BlackLabSnippetParser
action_steps.detail: Add private modifier to LEMMA_ATTR, LEMMA_ATTR_ANY, XPOS_ATTR, UPOS_ATTR, SENT_BOUND_LEFT, SENT_BOUND_RIGHT, XML_SENT_OPEN, XML_SENT_CLOSE at lines 12-19

action_steps.title: Remove extractHeadLemma alias and dead extractCollocateFromMatchText; deprecate extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition
action_steps.detail: Delete extractHeadLemma (1-line alias for extractLemmaAt(xml,1)); replace its call sites with extractLemmaAt(xml,1). Add @Deprecated to extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition. Remove or @Deprecated extractCollocateFromMatchText if unreferenced in production.

action_steps.title: Merge extractLemmaFromMatch and extractCollocateLemma into one method and fix naming mismatch
action_steps.detail: Both find last lemma= attribute -- consolidate into one canonical method. Rename to resolve the extract_lemma_naming_mismatch (extractLemmaFromMatch vs extractCollocateLemma imply different roles but do the same thing).

query-executor-cleanup.name: query-executor-cleanup
query-executor-cleanup.description: Fix exception handling, dead code, method naming, interface gaps, and unify duplicate dependency query methods in BlackLabQueryExecutor and QueryExecutor interface

action_steps.title: Propagate IOException from getTotalFrequency instead of swallowing
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method getTotalFrequency at lines 344-358: remove the broad 'catch (Exception e)' block that returns 0L. Instead, let exceptions propagate as IOException (already declared in the method signature). The silent 0 return corrupts logDice calculations where missing frequency defaults to zero instead of triggering proper error handling.

action_steps.title: Add executeDependencyPattern to QueryExecutor interface (done d4269f9)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method findCollocations at lines 78-92: replace the fallback 'logger.warn + pattern = "%s" []' block with 'throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unrecognized cqlPattern format: " + cqlPattern)'. The silent wildcard substitution returns unpredictable results that callers cannot distinguish from valid responses.

action_steps.title: Deprecate findDependencyCollocations and route through executeDependencyPattern with null headPosConstraint
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/QueryExecutor.java: add 'List<QueryResults.WordSketchResult> executeDependencyPattern(String lemma, String deprel, String headPosConstraint, double minLogDice, int maxResults) throws IOException;' method to the interface. In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java: rename methods to use consistent 'execute' prefix (findCollocations -> executeCollocations, findDependencyCollocations -> executeDependencyCollocations). Inline extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup private methods at their call sites. Remove the unreachable null check at line ~125 of findCollocations. Clean dead variable initializations in collectHits.

action_steps.title: Rename find/execute inconsistency: standardize QueryExecutor method prefixes
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java: findDependencyCollocations at lines 143-179 is a simpler version of executeDependencyPattern at lines 372-427. Unify by adding a nullable headPosConstraint parameter to the unified method (null = no constraint, equivalent to current findDependencyCollocations behavior). Remove findDependencyCollocations. Update src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/QueryExecutor.java interface and all callers in api/SketchHandlers.java.

action_steps.title: Remove dead extractCollocateFromMatchText from BlackLabSnippetParser
action_steps.detail: Done in commit d962248: extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup 3-line pass-throughs inlined to call BLSP directly

action_steps.title: Fix getTotalFrequency to rethrow exception instead of silently returning 0
action_steps.detail: Remove broad Exception catch that returns 0L in getTotalFrequency (lines 344-358). Rethrow as IOException so callers handle failure. Silent 0 corrupts logDice scores.

action_steps.title: Fix findCollocations to throw on unrecognized pattern format instead of silently falling back
action_steps.detail: Replace warning log + wildcard fallback (lines 78-92) with an IllegalArgumentException or IOException. Callers should know their pattern was not recognized.

action_steps.title: Add executeDependencyPattern to QueryExecutor interface; standardize find vs execute naming; inline thin delegators; clean dead code
action_steps.detail: Add executeDependencyPattern to QueryExecutor interface. Rename methods to use consistent execute prefix. Inline extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup. Remove unreachable null check in findCollocations line 125. Clean dead variable initializations in collectHits.

action_steps.title: Unify findDependencyCollocations and executeDependencyPattern into one method
action_steps.detail: findDependencyCollocations is a simpler subset of executeDependencyPattern. Unify by making headPosConstraint optional (null = no constraint). Remove findDependencyCollocations, update interface and callers.

sef-refactor.name: sef-refactor
sef-refactor.description: Fix compare() logic bug and oversize method, remove deprecated String constructor, rename compare(), move multi-seed orchestration from handler into SemanticFieldExplorer

action_steps.title: Deprecate SEF(String) constructor with @Deprecated (done c03f8e8)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java, method compare() lines 286-401: (1) In Phase 2 (~lines 326-370), either include minScore in the distinctivenessScore formula (currently only maxScore and variance are used) or delete the minScore variable to fix the unused computation. (2) Rename 'compare' to 'compareCollocateProfiles' throughout; update callers in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java.

action_steps.title: Rename compare() to compareCollocateProfiles() for clarity
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java, method compare() lines 286-401: extract Phase 1 (build adjectiveProfiles map, ~lines 305-324) into private buildAdjectiveProfiles(Set<String> seedNouns, double minLogDice, int maxPerNoun). Extract Phase 2 (compute metrics per adjective, ~lines 326-370) into private computeProfileMetrics(Map adjectiveProfiles, int nounCount). This reduces the 116-line method to a readable ~30-line orchestrator.

action_steps.title: Extract private helpers from compare() to break up 130-line method
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: (1) Add @Deprecated to the String indexPath constructor at lines 90-94; update Javadoc to say 'Use SemanticFieldExplorer(QueryExecutor) instead'; (2) Remove the relationName String parameter from exploreByPattern() -- it is only used in debug logger.info calls and has no behavioral effect on the query. Update all call sites in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java.

action_steps.title: Remove unused minScore variable from compare() or use it meaningfully
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: create method public ExploreMultiResult exploreMultiSeed(List<String> seeds, ExploreOptions options) that (1) calls exploreByPattern() for each seed, (2) computes collocate intersection, (3) builds the graph edges. In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java, method handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti at lines 176-302: replace the 127-line inline orchestration with a call to semanticFieldExplorer.exploreMultiSeed() and a simple response builder.

action_steps.title: Move multi-seed orchestration from ExplorationHandlers into SemanticFieldExplorer
action_steps.detail: Move the multi-seed loop from ExplorationHandlers.handleMultiSeedExplore into SemanticFieldExplorer as a new method exploreMultiSeed(List<String> seeds, ExploreOptions opts)

action_steps.title: Fix unused_minscore_in_compare logic bug and rename compare() to compareCollocateProfiles()
action_steps.detail: Either use minScore in the distinctiveness formula or remove the computation. Rename compare() to compareCollocateProfiles() to communicate it compares adjective profiles across seed nouns.

action_steps.title: Extract private methods from compare() to reduce its 116-line body
action_steps.detail: Extract buildAdjectiveProfiles() (Phase 1, ~20 lines), computeProfileMetrics() (Phase 2, ~45 lines), and sortAndFilterResults() (~10 lines) from the monolithic compare() method.

action_steps.title: Remove deprecated String constructor from SemanticFieldExplorer and remove relationName logging-only parameter
action_steps.detail: Deprecate then remove SEF(String indexPath) constructor (double-open risk, bypasses QueryExecutor interface). All callers should use SEF(QueryExecutor). Remove relationName parameter from exploreByPattern() -- it has no behavioral effect.

action_steps.title: Move multi-seed orchestration from ExplorationHandlers into SemanticFieldExplorer
action_steps.detail: The 127-line handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti duplicates multi-seed logic (collect collocates per seed, find intersections, build graph) that belongs in SEF. Create SEF.exploreMultiSeed() method. Handler delegates to it.

handler-cleanup.name: handler-cleanup
handler-cleanup.description: Add requireParam helper, shared collocation formatter, fix error status codes, fix JSON key casing, name constants, rename methods and variables in ExplorationHandlers and SketchHandlers

action_steps.title: Extract requireParam() helper to reduce repeated null/empty guard boilerplate
action_steps.detail: Add private static String requireParam(Map<String,String> params, HttpExchange ex, String name) throws IOException helper that validates and returns non-blank param or sends 400 and returns null

action_steps.detail: Extract private static void formatCollocationsResponse(List<CollocateResult> results) that builds JSON map with consistent keys, reducing 5+ inline response-building blocks to one method

action_steps.detail: Rename response JSON key 'log_dice' consistently (currently logDice in some, log_dice in others). Follow snake_case for all response keys per API surface review

action_steps.title: Standardize result count key (count vs hits) across concordance endpoints

action_steps.detail: Standardize query subject param: use 'lemma' for single-word sketch, 'seeds' for multi-seed explore (currently nouns/word1/seed mixed across endpoints)

action_steps.detail: Add named constants for frequently repeated inline CQL pattern strings e.g. VERB_RIGHT_PATTERN, NOUN_LEFT_PATTERN

action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/HttpApiUtils.java: add 'public static String requireParam(Map<String,String> params, String key, com.sun.net.httpserver.HttpExchange exchange) throws IOException' that checks params.get(key) is non-null/non-empty, calls sendError(exchange, 400, key + ' is required') and returns null if missing. In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java and SketchHandlers.java: replace the 6+ repeated null/empty guard patterns with calls to HttpApiUtils.requireParam(). Fix parseQueryParams in HttpApiUtils.java line ~102 to log AND return an empty map with an error flag rather than silently dropping the parameter.

action_steps.title: Add shared collocations-list formatter and named CQL pattern constants
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java and ExplorationHandlers.java: extract a private static Map<String,Object> formatCollocateEntry(WordSketchResult r) method that builds the {collocate, logdice, frequency, pos} Map structure currently duplicated inline in at least 3 handler methods. Move the hardcoded CQL pattern string for word-gap matching (the String.format pattern with {0,5} gap in handleConcordanceExamples) to a named constant CONCORDANCE_GAP_PATTERN.

action_steps.title: Fix error status codes, JSON key casing, and add consistent RuntimeException handling
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java method handleBcqlQueryPost lines 402-455: split the single catch block at line 449 into 'catch (IOException e) { sendError(exchange, 500, ...) }' and 'catch (Exception e) { sendError(exchange, 400, ...) }'. Change the key 'hits' at line 429 in BCQL response to 'count' to match /concordance/examples. Rename response fields matchStart->match_start, matchEnd->match_end, collocateLemma->collocate_lemma for snake_case consistency. In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/WordSketchApiServer.java add a try-catch for RuntimeException around each route handler lambda registration.

action_steps.title: Rename handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti to handleMultiSeedExplore and rename simplePattern variable
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java: rename method handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti to handleMultiSeedExplore and update the route binding in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/WordSketchApiServer.java line ~77. Rename the 'simplePattern' local variable in ExplorationHandlers to 'fallbackCollocatePattern' at its declaration site.

action_steps.title: Decompose monolithic handler methods by extracting parameter parsing, query execution, and response building into private helpers
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java: handleSemanticFieldExplore (121 lines, ~50-170) and handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (127 lines, ~176-302) each mix parameter parsing, query execution, and response building. Extract private parseExploreOptions(Map<String,String> params) -> ExploreOptions and private buildExploreResponse(ExplorationResult result) -> Map<String,Object> helpers. Apply same pattern in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java for handleConcordanceExamples (66 lines).

action_steps.title: Replace raw Map<String,Object> response building with typed response serialization
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java and SketchHandlers.java: all response bodies are built as new HashMap() with .put() calls. As a minimum improvement, extract a ResponseBuilder helper class in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ that provides typed builder methods for common response shapes (collocations list, exploration result, concordance hit) so JSON keys are constants not string literals.

api-contracts.name: api-contracts
api-contracts.description: Add typed constructors to ConcordanceResult, create SurfacePatternQuery parameter object, clarify LogDiceCalculator error return semantics

action_steps.title: Add factory methods to ConcordanceResult for the two valid construction contexts
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/QueryResults.java, ConcordanceResult class: the primary constructor accepts ~11 args with 7 nullable fields. Add 2 named static factory methods: ConcordanceResult.withContext(docId, position, word, lemma, tag, sentence, leftContext, rightContext, matchStart, matchEnd) and ConcordanceResult.minimal(docId, position, word, lemma) that enforce which fields are required for each use case. Mark context fields @Nullable or use Optional.

action_steps.title: Create SurfacePatternOptions record to replace 6-parameter method signature
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/QueryExecutor.java: create a record SurfacePatternQuery(String lemma, String bcqlPattern, int headPosition, int collocatePosition, double minLogDice, int maxResults) and change executeSurfacePattern signature to executeSurfacePattern(SurfacePatternQuery query). Update src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java and all callers in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java to use the new parameter object.

action_steps.title: Return LogDiceCalculator.NOT_COMPUTABLE sentinel instead of 0.0 for invalid inputs
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/LogDiceCalculator.java: add a public static final double UNCOMPUTABLE = Double.NaN (or -1.0) sentinel. In the compute() method, return UNCOMPUTABLE instead of 0.0 when f(A)+f(B) == 0 (division-by-zero case). Update callers in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java to check for LogDiceCalculator.UNCOMPUTABLE before including results.

action_steps.title: Add typed constructors or builder to ConcordanceResult to enforce valid field combinations
action_steps.detail: Replace the 11-arg constructor with 2-3 named constructors (full concordance with context, minimal concordance without context) that enforce which fields are required. Eliminates context-dependent nullable combinations.

action_steps.title: Create SurfacePatternQuery parameter object to replace executeSurfacePattern 6-arg signature
action_steps.detail: Create SurfacePatternQuery record with lemma, bcqlPattern, headPosition, collocatePosition, minLogDice, maxResults fields. Update QueryExecutor interface and BlackLabQueryExecutor to use it.

action_steps.title: Add UNCOMPUTABLE constant to LogDiceCalculator to distinguish error from valid zero score
action_steps.detail: Return LogDiceCalculator.UNCOMPUTABLE (e.g. Double.NaN or -1.0) when f(A)+f(B)=0 instead of 0.0. Update callers to check for the sentinel value.

logic-fixes.name: logic-fixes
logic-fixes.description: Fix three isolated one-method logic defects: integer overflow in CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits(), counter increment inside resource-close in ConlluConverter, and misleading indexFile() name that accepts directories

action_steps.title: Remove dead || freq >= 2 branch in identifyCoreCollocates
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/exploration/SemanticFieldExplorer.java identifyCoreCollocates(), remove '|| freq >= 2' from the threshold condition that checks minNounsForCore. The dynamic minNounsForCore already handles this.

action_steps.title: Extract named constant or comment for 3x over-fetch heuristic in scoreHits
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java scoreHits(), add private static final int OVER_FETCH_FACTOR = 3 and replace the literal 3 multiplication with it, plus a comment explaining it is an empirical factor to compensate for scoring discards.

action_steps.title: Extract helper methods from GrammarConfigLoader 95-line constructor
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, extract the constructor body (~95 lines) into private methods: parseRelationDef(JsonObject), validateConstraints(List), and buildRelationType(String). The constructor becomes 3 method calls.

action_steps.title: Add nouns_per parsing to ExploreParams to cover all 4 shared params
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java ExploreParams record, add int nounsPerSeed field with default parseInt('nouns_per') parsing. In handleSemanticFieldExplore(), replace ad-hoc parseInt('nouns_per') with params.nounsPerSeed.

action_steps.title: Fix integer overflow in CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits()
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/CollocateQueryHelper.java line 248, change 'int limit = Math.min(maxResults * OVER_FETCH_FACTOR, records.size())' to 'int limit = (int) Math.min((long) maxResults * OVER_FETCH_FACTOR, (long) records.size());'. OVER_FETCH_FACTOR=3 is at line 49. This mirrors the safe cast pattern already used in executeBcqlQuery() line 175.

action_steps.title: Fix counter increment inside resource-close block in ConlluConverter
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/blacklab/ConlluConverter.java lines 70-73, move chunks++ outside the try-with-resources block. Change: 'try (BufferedWriter toClose = writer) { chunks++; }' to 'try (BufferedWriter toClose = writer) {} chunks++;' so the counter increments only after a successful close, not if close() throws.

action_steps.title: Rename indexFile() to indexPath() in BlackLabConllUIndexer and update the call in Main.java
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/blacklab/BlackLabConllUIndexer.java line 80, rename method 'indexFile' to 'indexPath' (it already accepts both file and directory paths). In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/Main.java line 157, update the call from 'indexer.indexFile(wplTempDir.toString())' to 'indexer.indexPath(wplTempDir.toString())'.
